name: deja-dup
title: Déjà Dup Backups
description: Browse, search and restore files from your Déjà Dup (restic) backups
author: samvoelzke

commands.name: browse-backup
commands.title: Browse Backup
commands.subtitle: Déjà Dup
commands.description: Browse snapshots and restore individual files from your backup

commands.name: search-files
commands.title: Search Backup Files
commands.subtitle: Déjà Dup
commands.description: Search for files across your backup snapshots

commands.name: backup-status
commands.title: Backup Status
commands.subtitle: Déjà Dup
commands.description: See the last backup, destination, schedule and included paths

commands.name: index-latest
commands.title: Refresh Search Index
commands.subtitle: Déjà Dup
commands.description: Keep the latest backup indexed for instant browsing and search

preferences.name: dejaDupFlavor
preferences.title: Déjà Dup Installation
preferences.description: How Déjà Dup is installed. Auto-detects by default; override if detection is wrong or you use a custom setup.

preferences.name: backupPassword
preferences.title: Backup Password
preferences.description: Leave empty to read it from the keyring automatically. Set it only if the extension cannot find it (e.g. a Flatpak install, or a custom keyring).

preferences.name: autoIndex
preferences.title: Automatic Indexing
preferences.label: Keep the latest backup indexed in the background
preferences.description: When on, a new backup is indexed automatically in the background (downloads the file listing metadata over the network — scales with file count) so the first browse/search is instant. When off, you build the index on demand.

preferences.name: resticPath
preferences.title: restic Binary
preferences.description: Path to the restic executable (leave as 'restic' to use PATH). Ignored for Flatpak installs, which use their bundled restic.

preferences.name: rclonePath
preferences.title: rclone Binary
preferences.description: Path to the rclone executable (leave as 'rclone' to use PATH)

preferences.name: cacheDir
preferences.title: restic Cache Directory
preferences.description: Leave empty to reuse Déjà Dup's cache at ~/.cache/deja-dup/restic
